hooks.command: $j=$input|ConvertFrom-Json;if($j.tool_input.command -notmatch 'git\s+push'){exit 0};Write-Host 'Validating build before git push...';$o=& 'C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Community\MSBuild\Current\Bin\MSBuild.exe' 'D:\NooN\NooN.sln' /t:Build /p:Configuration=Debug /v:minimal 2>&1;$o|Write-Host;if($LASTEXITCODE-ne 0){@{continue=$false;stopReason='Build validation failed - fix compilation errors before pushing to GitHub.'}|ConvertTo-Json -Compress}else{Write-Host 'Build validation passed - proceeding with push.'}
